data.title: Partnership VIPC launches National Innovation Quarter in Virginia to boost innovation, entrepreneurship, and competitiveness.
data.description: A new initiative called the National Innovation Quarter (National IQ) has been launched in Arlington, Virginia on February 20, 2026. The aim of National IQ is to foster innovation, entrepreneurship, and enhance national competitiveness by linking individuals, locations, and programs. The Virginia Innovation Partnership Corp. (VIPC) spearheaded this celebration, marking the beginning of an effort to drive progress in these areas. This development signifies a step towards accelerating innovation and boosting competitiveness at a national level.

data.title: SmartRent co-founder becomes CEO of 1VALET, leading the company to expand its smart building system across North America.
data.description: 1VALET Corp., a prominent company specializing in smart building operating systems and video intercoms, recently disclosed their plans for expanding their unified system across North America. The transition in leadership, which took place on February 20, 2026, is set to facilitate this strategic move. With a focus on scaling operations, 1VALET aims to establish its presence in various locations within North America.

data.title: AerSale plans to release Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings on March 5, 2026, after market close. Conference call scheduled at 4:30 pm ET.
data.description: Miami-based AerSale Corporation (NASDAQ: ASLE) disclosed plans to reveal its financial performance for Q4 and the entire year of 2025 on March 5, 2026, after market hours. Along with this, a conference call will be held on the same day at 4:30 pm Eastern Time to delve into these figures.

data.title: David Simon resigns from Klépierre S.A. Supervisory Board on Feb. 19, 2026, announced by Simon Property Group.
data.description: On February 20, 2026, Simon®, a real estate investment trust, disclosed that David Simon has stepped down from the Klépierre S.A. Supervisory Board, effective February 19. Simon specializes in owning top-tier shopping, dining, entertainment, and mixed-use locations. This move marks a significant change within the company's leadership structure.

data.description: At 16:00 today, AS Tallink Grupp, a subsidiary of Aktsiaselts Infortar, released a statement about alterations in the Management Board. The detailed announcement can be found below and accessed through the provided link.

data.title: LHV Group acquired own shares on Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange from 13.-19.02.2026. No specific numbers mentioned.
data.description: LHV Group recently disclosed that in the week of 13th-19th February 2026, they purchased their own shares on the Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange.

data.title: VGTel, Inc. (OTC: VGTL) responds to Trump's UAP disclosure, reaffirms scientific monitoring strategy.
data.description: VGTel, Inc., traded on OTC as VGTL, has issued a statement regarding President Trump's recent disclosure comments regarding Unidentified Aerial Phenomena (UAP). The company has reiterated its commitment to a scientific monitoring strategy in response to this development.
